description_long: This object is a compact assault rifle with a distinctive curved magazine and a short barrel, reminiscent of the AKS-74U or similar carbine variants. The receiver and barrel assembly are constructed from dark, matte-finished metal, while the handguard and pistol grip are made of reddish-brown wood or polymer. The rifle features a folding metal stock, which is currently folded alongside the receiver, making the weapon more compact for urban maneuverability. The front sight is a simple post, and the rear sight is mounted on the top cover, both made of metal. The muzzle is equipped with a slant compensator, and the overall design is robust, utilitarian, and built for durability in harsh environments.
description: A compact, dark metal assault rifle with a curved magazine, short barrel, and folded metal stock, featuring reddish-brown wood or polymer furniture.
description_view_0: Front view showing the short barrel, front sight post, and slant compensator.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the folded metal stock, curved magazine, and reddish-brown handguard and grip.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the top cover, rear sight, and the compact profile of the folded stock.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the magazine, handguard, and the overall compactness of the rifle.
